---
title: html
---

```{r knitr_config, include=FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

* https://www.w3schools.com/html/default.asp  

*********************************************************************

<`tag` `attribute`="`property`:`value`;">

block-level elements  
`<div>`  
`<h1> - <h6>`  
`<p>`  
`<form>`  
`<header>`  
`<footer>`  
`<section>`  

inline elements  
`<span>`  
`<a>`  
`<img>`
